popularStory.headline: Ann Seymour
popularStory.description: Ann Seymour is the daughter of Jeremiah Seymour (1630 - 21 Sept 1683) and his wife Ann of Olney, Buckinghamshire County, England.  Ann Seymour (1652 - 1693) was married on 14 Nov 1682 to Richard York …

zh.lifeSummary: 當Ann Seymour於1652年出生在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯時，她的父親Jeremiah Seymour22歲，母親Ann Kennedy21歲。她於1682年11月14日與Richard York II在英國巴金哈姆爾奧爾尼結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1693年9月21日在英國巴金哈姆爾奧爾尼享年41歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ann Seymour于1652年出生在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾米爾頓 凱恩斯时，她的父亲Jeremiah Seymour22岁，母亲Ann Kennedy21岁。她于1682年11月14日与Richard York II在英国巴金哈姆爾奧爾尼结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1693年9月21日在英国巴金哈姆爾奧爾尼享年41岁，埋葬在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾艾勒斯波利 瓦爾。

nameMeanings.name: Seymour
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (London): of Norman origin, a habitational name from Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), and possibly also from Saint-Maur-des-Bois (Manche) and Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine), named from the dedication of their churches to Saint Maur (see   Moore   3). The family of this name who have held the title Duke of Somerset since 1547 are said by some to have originated in Saint-Maur-des-Fossés (Seine), while others claim they are from Saint-Maur-sur-Loire (Touraine). They rose to prominence under the Tudors, when Edward Seymour (died 1552) held a high position of office under Henry VIII, who was married to Edward's sister, Jane. The Norman name has been established in Ireland since at least the 17th century.

variants.name: Moore
meanings: English: from Middle English more ‘moor, marsh, fen’ (Old English mōr), hence a topographic name for someone who lived in such a place, or a habitational name from any of various places called with this word, as for example Moore in Cheshire or More in Shropshire.
English (of Norman origin): ethnic name from Old French more ‘Moor’, either someone from North Africa or, more often, a nickname for someone thought to resemble a Moor. Compare Morrell and Moreau .

English (of Norman origin): from the Middle English personal name More (Old French More, Maur, Latin Maurus), originally denoting either ‘Moor’ or someone with a swarthy complexion (compare Morrell , Morrin , Morris , and sense 2 above). There was a 6th-century Christian saint of this name.

variants.name: Semar
meanings: Germanized form of French Saint Marc, the name of a Huguenot family that migrated to the Palatinate.
English: variant of   Seymour  . This surname is very rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Ann
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Variant spelling of Anne . In the U.S. Ann is the more frequent spelling.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Ann Seymour was born in 1652, in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Jeremiah Seymour, was 22 and her mother, Ann Kennedy, was 21. She married Richard York II on 14 November 1682, in Olney, Buckinghamshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 21 September 1693, in Olney, Buckinghamshire, England, at the age of 41, and was buried in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ann Seymour est née en 1652, à Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Jeremiah Seymour, avait 22 ans et sa mère, Ann Kennedy, avait 21 ans. Elle a épousé Richard York II le 14 novembre 1682, à Olney, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 21 septembre 1693, à Olney, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 41 ans, et a été enterrée à Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ann Seymour 1652 in Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Jeremiah Seymour 22 und ihre Mutter Ann Kennedy 21. Sie hat am 14. November 1682 in Olney, Buckinghamshire, England Richard York II geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 21. September 1693 im Alter von 41 Jahren in Olney, Buckinghamshire, England und wurde in Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Seymour è nata il nel 1652 nel Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Jeremiah Seymour, aveva 22 anni e sua madre, Ann Kennedy, aveva 21 anni. Lei sposato Richard York II il 14 novembre 1682, nel Olney, Buckinghamshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 21 settembre 1693, nel Olney, Buckinghamshire, England, all'età di 41 anni, e fu sepolta a Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Ann Seymourが1652年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアミルトン ケインスで生まれた時，父Jeremiah Seymourは22歳，母Ann Kennedyは21歳であった。1682年11月14日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアオルニーでRichard York IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1693年9月21日にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアオルニーで41歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアエイレスブリー ベルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ann Seymour(이)가 1652년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 미턴 케인스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Jeremiah Seymour(은)는 22세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Ann Kennedy(은)는 21세였다. 그녀는 1682년 11월 14일 영국 벅잉함실르 니에서 Richard York II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1693년 9월 21일 영국 벅잉함실르 니에서 41세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 아일레스버이 발에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ann Seymour nasceu em 1652, em Milton Keynes, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Jeremiah Seymour, tinha 22 anos e sua mãe, Ann Kennedy, tinha 21 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard York II em 14 de novembro de 1682, em Olney, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 21 de setembro de 1693, em Olney, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, com 41 anos, e foi sepultada em Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ann Seymour родилась в 1652 г. в местности милтон кинесь, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Jeremiah Seymour было 22 года, а матери, которую звали Ann Kennedy, 21. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard York II 14 ноября 1682 г. в местности олни, буккингхамшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 21 сентября 1693 г. в местности олни, буккингхамшир, Англия в возрасте 41 год и была похоронена в местности аилесбури веил, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Richard York II el 14 de noviembre de 1682, en Olney, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 21 de septiembre de 1693, en Olney, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 41 años, y fue sepultada en Aylesbury Vale, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
